programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode we catch up on the results from the World Series in Oman, go on a sailing adventure on the Spirit of Bermuda and get a windsurfing lesson with Upwind Sports. We celebrate Good Friday Bermuda style, get VIP access to a new America’s Cup Exhibit, and catch up with the America’s Cup Endeavour Programme and the Red Bull Youth America’s Cup hopefuls!

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 5
programme.desc: In tonight's episode the Clipper Race fleet takes on the Asia Pacific Leg, split across two stages with spectacular destinations in China; crews celebrate the Chinese New Year at sea and swelter in the backing tropical heat; there's a second visit by King Neptune as father and son cross the equator and loved ones missed on Valentines Day.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Round Robin 1-2 Week 1
programme.desc: Every match of the PRADA Cup is a one-on-one duel of strategy and tactics, and time is of the essence. The Round Robins will define who will pass directly into the final and who, on the other hand, will have to compete in the semi-final before moving forward to the final.The first to win 7 races will move directly into the final of the competition. Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli, INEOS Team UK and NYYC American Magic are the three contenders in this year's Round Robin. Who will move on directly to the final? Find it out, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 3 World Cup Tacen
programme.desc: We are in stage three of the Canoe Slalom World Cup, and this time we will be competing on the water of Ljubljana, in Tacen. The racing conditions are perfect and we are focused on the final: men will be competing in C1 and women in K1. Matej Benus who was leading the standings in the men's category will not be competing in the final, so Benjamin Savsek has a chance to step up in the podium. Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: We are in Markkleeberg, Germany, for round four of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. This is the third time this venue hosts a World Cup, and 183 athletes from 26 countries have enrolled, competing for points across the five-race World Cup. As we are a month away from the olympic qualifiers and World Championships in Spain, we are ready for a sharp end of the 2019 international racing season. Discover the best moments in Markkleeberg on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 3
programme.desc: Out of the fray and sitting pretty after winning the Round Robin qualifiers, Oracle Team USA now waits for the winner. Following the script, France says goodbye while the fabulous four New Zealand, Sweden, Great Britain and Japan take on the Louis Vuitton Challenger Playoffs. We will talk with weather guru inside the role of America's Cup meteorologists and close up at the heart of Artemis Racing, the Swedish Challenger.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Korcula – Stari Grad
programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. We will taste some amazing cuisine and attend Moreska dance that is preserved from the Middle Ages and it is performed only here on island of Korcula. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Vrboska - Split

programme.title: Surfer's Blood

Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode, we are meeting Chef Dimitri who has a special surprise prepared for us. He will join us on our boat to prepare a unique fish soup, and we are ready to share this delicacy with the people in the port. We will also be meeting Chef Kostas who has his own recipe for pasta with tuna. Come on board and try it out!

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 3 World Cup Tacen
programme.desc: We are in stage three of the Canoe Slalom World Cup, and this time we will be competing on the water of Ljubljana, in Tacen. The racing conditions are perfect and we are focused on the final: men will be competing in C1 and women in K1. Matej Benus who was leading the standings in the men's category will not be competing in the final, so Benjamin Savsek has a chance to step up in the podium. Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg

Discover the best moments in Markkleeberg on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Korcula – Stari Grad
programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. We will taste some amazing cuisine and attend Moreska dance that is preserved from the Middle Ages and it is performed only here on island of Korcula. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Vrboska - Split
programme.desc: Small city of Vrboska is a little piece of paradise for yachtsmen and Split is the biggest city in Dalmatia. We will show you where to go, what to see, and of course, some amazing food suggestions.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 4
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is back to Cape Town to meet up with two board riders. Tammy Robarts has just returned from the ISA World Surfing Games where she represented South Africa in stand up Paddleboarding. The winds in Cape Town have picked up and its time to meet with Luke Mc Gillewie, South Africa's top kite surfer.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 5
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is discovering and experiencing the coastline of South Africa through some of its remarkable personalities and their human spirit.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 1
programme.desc: As soon as we arrive on the island, we begin to explore Zanzibar starting in the northern part of the country. Nungwi, our chosen location is a common touristic destination and its guests are famously welcoming. Let's begin our journey by visiting the famous sea turtle conservation and protection center. Buckle up for this adventure!

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 2
programme.desc: We begin this day of discoveries with a visit to the most important historical landmarks in Stone Town. For lunch, we head straight on to The Rock: one of Zanzibar's greatest icons. The restaurant was literally built on a rock and can only be reached on foot during the low tide. Then, we will follow Shabed's suggestion and dive into the water to try all the activities available.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2015
programme.desc: Among the world's greatest boat shows, Salon Nautique in Paris is back! Join Nico Peduzzi at the prestigious Port de Versailles and discover this year's hottest innovations in sailing, motorboats, board sports, equipment, tourism and more.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2016
programme.desc: By the industry and the financial world as a whole it's considered one of the most important venues in the field. For the passionate French public it's an absolute must to prepare for next year's season on the water. There's just no other place like the Paris Nautic, because France is possibly the greatest boating nation on the planet. Expected in the thousands starting on Saturday December the third until the following weekend, fans will be storming the pavillions of Porte de Versailles looking for the latest innovations and the best possible deal.

Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: We are in Markkleeberg, Germany, for round four of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. This is the third time this venue hosts a World Cup, and 183 athletes from 26 countries have enrolled, competing for points across the five-race World Cup. As we are a month away from the olympic qualifiers and World Championships in Spain, we are ready for a sharp end of the 2019 international racing season. Discover the best moments in Markkleeberg on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 5
programme.desc: From big and energetic cities to beautiful small villages, Quebec has it all. A stunning coastline and amazing food, but more than anything else, pristine wilderness. The Saguenay-Lac-Saint-Jean region boasts three national parks and a dramatic Saguenay Fjord. This time, Ken Whiting will tackle one of Eastern Canada's most popular whitewater rivers.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 6
programme.desc: Montreal is a historic and multicultural place that pulses with energy. What makes it particularly amazing is that it also provides easy access to outdoor activities and world-class paddling opportunities, both inside and outside city limits. The Eastern Townships are known for their charming villages, incredible food and beautiful waterways. This week we are exploring them and Montreal.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 5 World Cup Final Prague
programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic

programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 5 World Cup Final Prague
programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Karujet 2017
programme.desc: The much awaited 20th edition of the Karujet has finally roared through the island of Guadeloupe. With the world's top guns of Jet Ski racing on the pitch, these daredevils ploughed through waves at speeds of up to 80 knots. Competition is rough as some participants break down and return to the beach with broken bones, others just give up, while the remaining brave riders fight to the end!The event takes place in no other than the festive and colorful Caribbean island, Guadeloupe. To bring this event to life, people from all over the world join to create what is becoming the biggest nautical event for Jet Ski lovers of the year.As competitors speed across the ocean, firm land spectators await in an exciting celebration. Who will become this year’s champion? Join Nautical channel as we follow the 20th edition of what might be the last Karujet.

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 6
programme.desc: Coming up we are in the US coast, where the crews take on the Pacific from Seattle down to Panama; the fleet transits through one of the modern wonders of the world - the Panama Canal; and finally a testing shorter race through the Caribbean up to the big apple, as the teams converge on New York.

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 7
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 7

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 5
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand take Bermuda by storm as Peter Burling knocks out James Spithill in the first four races. Now, it's an uphill battle for Oracle Team USA at the 35th America's Cup. On the tech specs, we unveil the secrets of speed and why Team New Zealand has delivered a better overall package on their powerful AC50 'Aoateroa'. Watch the full recap of the AC35 kickoff.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Round Robin 3 Week 2
programme.desc: The Round Robin competition continues as teams face each other in 4 rounds to determine who will advance to the final and who will have to compete in a semi-final before heading to the final of the Prada Cup.Get ready to see INEOS Team UK, NYYC American Magic and Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli compete ferociously in one of the top competitions of sailing.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 5 World Cup Final Prague
programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.desc: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

On the tech specs, we unveil the secrets of speed and why Team New Zealand has delivered a better overall package on their powerful AC50 'Aoateroa'. Watch the full recap of the AC35 kickoff.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Transat Jacques Vabre - Episode 2 Arrival
programme.desc: The multihulls and monohulls are competing to the extreme in order to arrive in first place at Itajai in Brazil. After the non-stop 5,450 nautical mile course from France to Brazil, the skippers see the bright light ahead and rush towards Brazilian shores. What team will be the ultimate winner of this year's edition of the Transat Jacques Vabre? Find out on the 2013 edition of this transatlantic ocean competition.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Colours Of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Guadeloupe: the French overseas paradise in the southern Caribbean Sea. Clear blue waters, green vegetation and vibrant people bring out a whole rainbow of emotions in a limited island. Find out the true colours that wrap Guadeloupe with local guide Rudy as we dive into the cultural vibes of the country. From open markets to the local fishmongers and fishermen encircled by pelicans, Guadeloupe is full of secrets only locals know about. Rudy is determined to unveil them and share with us his passion for his beloved island while driving past the volcanic beaches that surround it.Get ready to meet local friends and hear their stories while discovering the Colours of Guadeloupe, now on Nautical Channel.

Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 5 World Cup Final Prague
programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 7
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 7

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 5
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand take Bermuda by storm as Peter Burling knocks out James Spithill in the first four races. Now, it's an uphill battle for Oracle Team USA at the 35th America's Cup. On the tech specs, we unveil the secrets of speed and why Team New Zealand has delivered a better overall package on their powerful AC50 'Aoateroa'. Watch the full recap of the AC35 kickoff.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4

programme.title: China Cup International Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: China Cup International Regatta - Episode 1

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Colours Of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Guadeloupe: the French overseas paradise in the southern Caribbean Sea. Clear blue waters, green vegetation and vibrant people bring out a whole rainbow of emotions in a limited island. Find out the true colours that wrap Guadeloupe with local guide Rudy as we dive into the cultural vibes of the country. From open markets to the local fishmongers and fishermen encircled by pelicans, Guadeloupe is full of secrets only locals know about. Rudy is determined to unveil them and share with us his passion for his beloved island while driving past the volcanic beaches that surround it.Get ready to meet local friends and hear their stories while discovering the Colours of Guadeloupe, now on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Flavours of Venice, Andi will be learning the art of the gondola, visiting one of the most beautiful displays of art and getting a taste of the lagoon. She will not only be in the city with cicchetti, but also on board with Dimitri Gris. Join her on this new adventure of Flavours of Venice, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have approached the end of the series, and in this final episode Andi will be experiencing the art of glass blowing on the island of Murano. Then, she will enjoy a vegan meal prepared on board that has been paired with coffee instead of wine. Let's dive into the flavours of Venice!

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 9: Rijeka, Opatija, Lika
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 9: Rijeka, Opatija, Lika

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 10: Istra
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 10: Istra

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 6
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is discovering and experiencing the coastline of South Africa through some of its remarkable personalities and their human spirit.

programme.title: Inside Vienna - Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports
programme.desc: Welcome to Vienna!Austria’s capital, lying by the Danube River and known for its artistic and intellectual legacy shaped by residents as Mozart, Beethoven or Sigmund Freud amongst others. Vienna is a city known for its tradition, but has also become the scene for modern nautical sports that are shifting the world of water sports.From meeting the Austrian Olympic rowing team to freestyle kayaking and a rendezvous with the local Gondola Club, host Lucia Metzbauer is on a quest to discover the nautical sports and athletes of Vienna. She is set for a challenge as she sails across all the different sport options in the city.Become part of the Vienna scenery and discover the water sports this city has to offer from the side of Lucia Metzbauer, on Inside Vienna – Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6 - Sibenik Islands - Murter
programme.desc: There are several interesting islands in the Sibenik area and we visited some of them. The island of Murter is known for its famous figs and delicacies from this healthy fruit. We will also show you some interesting places for swimming and sailing.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Kornati – Dugi Otok
programme.desc: Kornati Islands are a National park and one of the most amazing creation of nature (or God) and sailing here is a real rest for heart and soul. Dugi Otok with its natural beauty, interesting places and amazing gastronomy is a real paradise for sailors.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2017
programme.desc: The Paris Boat Show is considered by the nautical industry one of the most important venues in the field. For the passionate French public, this event is an absolute must, and we agree there is no other place like the Paris Nautic as France is possibly the greatest boating nation on the world. Thousands are expected to arrive on the 3rd of December until the following weekend, and fans will be storming the pavillions of Porte de Versailles for the latest innovation and best deals. Are you going to miss it? Come join us, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2018
programme.desc: The Nautic Paris International Boat Show returns in 2018 to welcome hundreds of nautical enthusiasts inside its doors. We will be able to find out the latest trends in nautical equipment, sailing vessels, superyachts or rental services. Are you ready to discover the latest in the nautical industry? Come dive with us in the 2018 Salon Nautique Paris.

The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 7
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 7

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 5
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand take Bermuda by storm as Peter Burling knocks out James Spithill in the first four races. Now, it's an uphill battle for Oracle Team USA at the 35th America's Cup. On the tech specs, we unveil the secrets of speed and why Team New Zealand has delivered a better overall package on their powerful AC50 'Aoateroa'. Watch the full recap of the AC35 kickoff.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4

programme.title: China Cup International Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: China Cup International Regatta - Episode 1

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6 - Sibenik Islands - Murter
programme.desc: There are several interesting islands in the Sibenik area and we visited some of them. The island of Murter is known for its famous figs and delicacies from this healthy fruit. We will also show you some interesting places for swimming and sailing.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Kornati – Dugi Otok
programme.desc: Kornati Islands are a National park and one of the most amazing creation of nature (or God) and sailing here is a real rest for heart and soul. Dugi Otok with its natural beauty, interesting places and amazing gastronomy is a real paradise for sailors.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Flavours of Venice, Andi will be learning the art of the gondola, visiting one of the most beautiful displays of art and getting a taste of the lagoon. She will not only be in the city with cicchetti, but also on board with Dimitri Gris. Join her on this new adventure of Flavours of Venice, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have approached the end of the series, and in this final episode Andi will be experiencing the art of glass blowing on the island of Murano. Then, she will enjoy a vegan meal prepared on board that has been paired with coffee instead of wine. Let's dive into the flavours of Venice!

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Colours Of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Guadeloupe: the French overseas paradise in the southern Caribbean Sea. Clear blue waters, green vegetation and vibrant people bring out a whole rainbow of emotions in a limited island. Find out the true colours that wrap Guadeloupe with local guide Rudy as we dive into the cultural vibes of the country. From open markets to the local fishmongers and fishermen encircled by pelicans, Guadeloupe is full of secrets only locals know about. Rudy is determined to unveil them and share with us his passion for his beloved island while driving past the volcanic beaches that surround it.Get ready to meet local friends and hear their stories while discovering the Colours of Guadeloupe, now on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 7
programme.desc: Poland is a place of immense historical significant that goes back more than a thousand years. Although it is well known for its role in the Second World War, Poland is also being appreciated for its world class cuisine, breathtaking countryside and ease of travel. This week on Facing Waves, we are set to discover the beautiful waterways of Poland.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 1
programme.desc: Facing Waves - Episode 1

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Poznan
programme.desc: Welcome to Poznan in Poland. We are at Lake Malta for the first ICF Canoe Sprint World Cup of 2019. For athletes, a hard winter's training has come to an end and they are ready to test themselves on the world stage to lay down a marker ahead of this season's big focus: the World Championships in Hungary. They are getting ready to race for their country at the 2020 Olympic Games in Tokyo. Who will be making an impact in this first event? Discover the best moments of the 2019 Canoe Sprint World Cup in Poland.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. In the C1 men's the medalists from last weekend will also not be racing here, but there are some big names in the lineup. Let's dive into the action in Bratislava.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 7
programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.title: Colours Of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Guadeloupe: the French overseas paradise in the southern Caribbean Sea. Clear blue waters, green vegetation and vibrant people bring out a whole rainbow of emotions in a limited island. Find out the true colours that wrap Guadeloupe with local guide Rudy as we dive into the cultural vibes of the country. From open markets to the local fishmongers and fishermen encircled by pelicans, Guadeloupe is full of secrets only locals know about. Rudy is determined to unveil them and share with us his passion for his beloved island while driving past the volcanic beaches that surround it.Get ready to meet local friends and hear their stories while discovering the Colours of Guadeloupe, now on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: The European Dragon Championship promises to amaze spectators with the continent’s top dragon sailors racing in one of the world’s most beautiful sailing arenas, the Italian Riviera.

programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 3

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Flavours of Venice, Andi will be learning the art of the gondola, visiting one of the most beautiful displays of art and getting a taste of the lagoon. She will not only be in the city with cicchetti, but also on board with Dimitri Gris. Join her on this new adventure of Flavours of Venice, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have approached the end of the series, and in this final episode Andi will be experiencing the art of glass blowing on the island of Murano. Then, she will enjoy a vegan meal prepared on board that has been paired with coffee instead of wine. Let's dive into the flavours of Venice!

programme.title: World Rowing Beach Sprint - HL - Finals Antalya (Turkey)
programme.desc: World Rowing Beach Sprint - HL - Finals Antalya (Turkey)

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3 Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: With 150 competitors from over 30 countries, the UIM ABP Tour is ready for another weekend of non-stop action with the elite riders, joined by new riders competing in the single events of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. In this episode, we are ready to see all the ski action in the Grand Prix of Italy taking place in Olbia.Come join us in this beautiful holiday destination that attracted international riders for the world champion title.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Poznan
programme.desc: Welcome to Poznan in Poland. We are at Lake Malta for the first ICF Canoe Sprint World Cup of 2019. For athletes, a hard winter's training has come to an end and they are ready to test themselves on the world stage to lay down a marker ahead of this season's big focus: the World Championships in Hungary. They are getting ready to race for their country at the 2020 Olympic Games in Tokyo. Who will be making an impact in this first event? Discover the best moments of the 2019 Canoe Sprint World Cup in Poland.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. In the C1 men's the medalists from last weekend will also not be racing here, but there are some big names in the lineup. Let's dive into the action in Bratislava.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6 - Sibenik Islands - Murter
programme.desc: There are several interesting islands in the Sibenik area and we visited some of them. The island of Murter is known for its famous figs and delicacies from this healthy fruit. We will also show you some interesting places for swimming and sailing.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Kornati – Dugi Otok
programme.desc: Kornati Islands are a National park and one of the most amazing creation of nature (or God) and sailing here is a real rest for heart and soul. Dugi Otok with its natural beauty, interesting places and amazing gastronomy is a real paradise for sailors.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5

programme.title: Barcolana 50
programme.desc: For all sea and sailing lovers and those who would never miss this one-of-a-kind show, the place is always the same every year: Trieste. Founded in 1969 thanks to the initiative of the yacht club Società Velica di Barcola e Grignano, the Barcolana competition has won its worldwide renown.This year’s 50th edition will be packed with surprises: more than 400 offshore and onshore activities, the opportunity to admire the vessel Nave Vespucci, the Barcolana 50 special postage stamp, and the Frecce Tricolori airshow just a few minutes before the start of the race. Stunningly huge yachts and sailboats steered by sailing enthusiasts will compete in the Regatta to mark this special edition of Barcolana 50.Follow this year’s competition of Barcolana 50: the international regatta that has won the Guinness World Record for the greatest sailing race.

programme.title: Transpac Yacht Race - Episode 1
programme.desc: Aloha! Honolulu, Hawaii, is ready for the 51st edition of the Transpac. 40 teams starting in San Pedro will embark in a lifetime journey across the Pacific to get to Hawaiian waters. This year we have seen some of the fastest times in this race, broken masts at the start of the race and some other serious damage incidents across the trip.Enjoy the best moments of the 2021 edition of the Transpac Yacht Race.

programme.title: Transat Jacques Vabre - Episode 1
programme.desc: The 15th edition of the Transat Jacques Vabre is here! Injecting a fresh change, sailors are bound for Martinique and will explore for the first time the West Indies. Be part of the best moments of one of the most demanding transatlantic crossings that promises to be a sensational show as four different boat classes will be giving their all in unpredictable Atlantic waters.

programme.title: Les Voiles De St Barth - Episode 1
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: Les Voiles De St Barth - Episode 1
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 1

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 2

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 1
programme.desc: Our DJ adventure is about to begin! Come with us as we pack our bags and leave for sunny Ibiza in Spain. After dropping our bags we are saying hi to David Guetta before trying out our skills as DJs and finding out how Ibiza's nightlife will surprise us. Join us!
