However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6 - Sibenik Islands - Murter
programme.desc: There are several interesting islands in the Sibenik area and we visited some of them. The island of Murter is known for its famous figs and delicacies from this healthy fruit. We will also show you some interesting places for swimming and sailing.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Kornati – Dugi Otok
programme.desc: Kornati Islands are a National park and one of the most amazing creation of nature (or God) and sailing here is a real rest for heart and soul. Dugi Otok with its natural beauty, interesting places and amazing gastronomy is a real paradise for sailors.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3 Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: With 150 competitors from over 30 countries, the UIM ABP Tour is ready for another weekend of non-stop action with the elite riders, joined by new riders competing in the single events of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. In this episode, we are ready to see all the ski action in the Grand Prix of Italy taking place in Olbia.Come join us in this beautiful holiday destination that attracted international riders for the world champion title.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5

programme.title: Barcolana 50
programme.desc: For all sea and sailing lovers and those who would never miss this one-of-a-kind show, the place is always the same every year: Trieste. Founded in 1969 thanks to the initiative of the yacht club Società Velica di Barcola e Grignano, the Barcolana competition has won its worldwide renown.This year’s 50th edition will be packed with surprises: more than 400 offshore and onshore activities, the opportunity to admire the vessel Nave Vespucci, the Barcolana 50 special postage stamp, and the Frecce Tricolori airshow just a few minutes before the start of the race. Stunningly huge yachts and sailboats steered by sailing enthusiasts will compete in the Regatta to mark this special edition of Barcolana 50.Follow this year’s competition of Barcolana 50: the international regatta that has won the Guinness World Record for the greatest sailing race.

programme.title: Les Voiles De St Barth - Episode 1
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Ugljan – Ist – Silba
programme.desc: The island of Ugljan, right across the town of Zadar, is known for its olives and olive produce. Beautiful sandy beaches and crystal clear sea will take your breath away. Smaller island of the Zadar archipelago like Ist and Silba looks like frozen in time and are really great for escaping from civilization.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9 - Zadar Islands – Zadar
programme.desc: Small islands of Zadar archipelago are very popular for sailing and we will show you why. The town of Zadar was founded in Roman times and by every step through it you will stumble upon amazing heritage from the ancient times. Of course, we couldn't resist and we visited crazy funny Museum of Illusions.

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - 2013
programme.desc: Set in the iconic Port Hercules of the Principality of Monaco since 1991, the MYS is the only place to admire, visit and purchase around 125 extraordinary one-off superyachts built by the world’s most respectful shipyards. Experience the luxury, learn what is trending in the yachting world, and see exclusive test runs of this year's hottest yachts!

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - 2014
programme.desc: Experience the most prestigious yachting event in the world! Nautical Channel will cover this luxurious event and will show you all there is the know about the most exclusive yachts of the year!

programme.desc: With 150 competitors from over 30 countries, the UIM ABP Tour is ready for another weekend of non-stop action with the elite riders, joined by new riders competing in the single events of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. In this episode, we are ready to see all the ski action in the Grand Prix of Italy taking place in Olbia.Come join us in this beautiful holiday destination that attracted international riders for the world champion title.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Ugljan – Ist – Silba
programme.desc: The island of Ugljan, right across the town of Zadar, is known for its olives and olive produce. Beautiful sandy beaches and crystal clear sea will take your breath away. Smaller island of the Zadar archipelago like Ist and Silba looks like frozen in time and are really great for escaping from civilization.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9 - Zadar Islands – Zadar
programme.desc: Small islands of Zadar archipelago are very popular for sailing and we will show you why. The town of Zadar was founded in Roman times and by every step through it you will stumble upon amazing heritage from the ancient times. Of course, we couldn't resist and we visited crazy funny Museum of Illusions.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 2
programme.desc: Facing Waves - Episode 2

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 3
programme.desc: Facing Waves - Episode 3

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 3 World Championships Szeged
programme.desc: Welcome to the Canoe Sprint World Championships 2019 celebrated in Szeged, Hungary! Today there are about 1,200 athletes racing from approximately 98 nations, meaning this is the biggest World Championships canoe sprint racing has ever seen. We're about to witness the fastest paddlers on the planet battle it out for medals, for World Championship glory, and to qualify for their country at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. Enjoy the best moments at Szeged on the 2019 Sprint World Championships.

programme.title: Vendée Arctique - Highlights
programme.desc: Skippers are getting ready for the 2022 edition of the Vendée Arctique: the solo race that surrounds Iceland before returning back to Les Sables d'Olonne. Jérémie Beyou became the winner of the 2020 edition of this arduous competition, but seeing the trajectory of Charlie Dalin and Thomas Ruyant, competition is closest than ever. Unpredictability in weather forecasts will force organizers to cut the race short, meaning skippers are running out of time to reduce distances.

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5

programme.title: Barcolana 50
programme.desc: For all sea and sailing lovers and those who would never miss this one-of-a-kind show, the place is always the same every year: Trieste. Founded in 1969 thanks to the initiative of the yacht club Società Velica di Barcola e Grignano, the Barcolana competition has won its worldwide renown.This year’s 50th edition will be packed with surprises: more than 400 offshore and onshore activities, the opportunity to admire the vessel Nave Vespucci, the Barcolana 50 special postage stamp, and the Frecce Tricolori airshow just a few minutes before the start of the race. Stunningly huge yachts and sailboats steered by sailing enthusiasts will compete in the Regatta to mark this special edition of Barcolana 50.Follow this year’s competition of Barcolana 50: the international regatta that has won the Guinness World Record for the greatest sailing race.

programme.title: European Dragon Championship
programme.desc: The European Dragon Championship promises to amaze spectators with the continent’s top dragon sailors racing in one of the world’s most beautiful sailing arenas, the Italian Riviera.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Les Voiles De St Barth - Episode 1
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 3
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 3

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 4
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 4

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: Cape Verdean Kite Crossing
programme.desc: Mitu Monteiro, a Cape Verdean kitesurfer and multi-time world champion, attempts the solo crossing of the twelve volcanic islands of his native archipelago, never accomplished before.Taking on more than 730km of kitesurfing, interspersed with island traverses by only man-powered means totalling approximately 200km, Mitu’s challenges lay ahead of him. With a total trajectory of nearly 1,000km and a route that had to be thought and rethought due to wind direction, shark infested waters, and distances that push this athlete to his limit, sweat will flow and his nerves will surely be put to the test.Mitu’s maverick journey across marvellous Atlantic waters and beaches, through inhospitable lunar landscapes and the lush vegetation of the volcanic islands is truly a SURFARI on a kite. Relive the whole experience on Nautical Channel.

We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 3 World Championships Szeged
programme.desc: Welcome to the Canoe Sprint World Championships 2019 celebrated in Szeged, Hungary! Today there are about 1,200 athletes racing from approximately 98 nations, meaning this is the biggest World Championships canoe sprint racing has ever seen. We're about to witness the fastest paddlers on the planet battle it out for medals, for World Championship glory, and to qualify for their country at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. Enjoy the best moments at Szeged on the 2019 Sprint World Championships.

programme.title: Vendée Arctique - Highlights
programme.desc: Skippers are getting ready for the 2022 edition of the Vendée Arctique: the solo race that surrounds Iceland before returning back to Les Sables d'Olonne. Jérémie Beyou became the winner of the 2020 edition of this arduous competition, but seeing the trajectory of Charlie Dalin and Thomas Ruyant, competition is closest than ever. Unpredictability in weather forecasts will force organizers to cut the race short, meaning skippers are running out of time to reduce distances.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5

programme.title: Barcolana 50
programme.desc: For all sea and sailing lovers and those who would never miss this one-of-a-kind show, the place is always the same every year: Trieste. Founded in 1969 thanks to the initiative of the yacht club Società Velica di Barcola e Grignano, the Barcolana competition has won its worldwide renown.This year’s 50th edition will be packed with surprises: more than 400 offshore and onshore activities, the opportunity to admire the vessel Nave Vespucci, the Barcolana 50 special postage stamp, and the Frecce Tricolori airshow just a few minutes before the start of the race. Stunningly huge yachts and sailboats steered by sailing enthusiasts will compete in the Regatta to mark this special edition of Barcolana 50.Follow this year’s competition of Barcolana 50: the international regatta that has won the Guinness World Record for the greatest sailing race.

programme.title: World Rowing Beach Sprint - HL - Finals Antalya (Turkey)
programme.desc: World Rowing Beach Sprint - HL - Finals Antalya (Turkey)

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3 Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: With 150 competitors from over 30 countries, the UIM ABP Tour is ready for another weekend of non-stop action with the elite riders, joined by new riders competing in the single events of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. In this episode, we are ready to see all the ski action in the Grand Prix of Italy taking place in Olbia.Come join us in this beautiful holiday destination that attracted international riders for the world champion title.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Ugljan – Ist – Silba
programme.desc: The island of Ugljan, right across the town of Zadar, is known for its olives and olive produce. Beautiful sandy beaches and crystal clear sea will take your breath away. Smaller island of the Zadar archipelago like Ist and Silba looks like frozen in time and are really great for escaping from civilization.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9 - Zadar Islands – Zadar
programme.desc: Small islands of Zadar archipelago are very popular for sailing and we will show you why. The town of Zadar was founded in Roman times and by every step through it you will stumble upon amazing heritage from the ancient times. Of course, we couldn't resist and we visited crazy funny Museum of Illusions.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.1 DUBROVNIK - KORČULA
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.1 DUBROVNIK - KORČULA

programme.title: European Dragon Championship
programme.desc: The European Dragon Championship promises to amaze spectators with the continent’s top dragon sailors racing in one of the world’s most beautiful sailing arenas, the Italian Riviera.

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Les Voiles De St Barth - Episode 1
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

We will be focusing on the Runabout and Freestyle divisions.Come join us in one of the most scenic and gorgeous corners of the Mediterranean island of Sardinia for the best aquabike action.

programme.title: US F1 Powerboats - Round 2 Gulfport
programme.desc: Welcome to Toledo, Ohio, for the Pro Medica Rock the River Event as we are head over heels to bring you the round to the 2019 NGK F1 powerboat series. programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 4 - GP of Italy - Olbia
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 4 - GP of Italy - Olbia

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3bis Freestyle Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the beautiful Olbia in the northeastern coast of Sardinia. Notoriously rough water conditions await as round two of the 2019 season will be raced at the Grand Prix of Italy. 150 riders from 30 countries raced in the different categories. We will be focusing on the Runabout and Freestyle divisions.Come join us in one of the most scenic and gorgeous corners of the Mediterranean island of Sardinia for the best aquabike action.

programme.title: Nice Ultimed
programme.desc: From April 24th to May 6th, four elite skippers will respectively compete on the biggest racing boats in the world. Nice UltiMed is a clash of titans right in the heart of the Mediterranean, and it is worthy of the attention of spectators worldwide.The crews of 3-6 will participate in an offshore sprint, starting and ending in Nice, France. They will be sailing on maxi trimarans measuring more than 30 meters and will pass by Corsica, Sardinia, the Balearic Islands, and the coastline of the Région Provence-Alpes-Côte d´Azur.The skippers will be sailing assisted by their crews on their maxi trimarans, exploiting the full power and speed of these machines.Have you ever seen anything like it? Join us as we follow along on what promises to be an unprecedented race where outstanding sailors are capable of taming the oceans single-handedly on the Ultimed.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Surfing Games
programme.desc: Up to 200 surfers from 40 nations will battle for a medal in the ISA World Surfing Games 2017. Biarritz La Grande Plage will host the event, thus celebrating the 60th anniversary of surfing’s arrival in France. The athletes will compete for the titles: Men’s Individual, Women’s Individual, National World Champion, and Relay World Champion. Join us and have a taste of the high-performance surfing to come in Tokyo 2020!

programme.title: PRADA 36th America's Cup - Highlight
programme.desc: The moment everyone was waiting for has arrived: the 36th America’s Cup has started. Postponed a couple of days due to restrictions, it has finally started with a big start. The defender team started the day with an aggressive start and taking the lead, but Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli came to win this competition. What will happen at the end of this day? Watch the highlights of the competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 3 World Championships Szeged
programme.desc: Welcome to the Canoe Sprint World Championships 2019 celebrated in Szeged, Hungary! Today there are about 1,200 athletes racing from approximately 98 nations, meaning this is the biggest World Championships canoe sprint racing has ever seen. We're about to witness the fastest paddlers on the planet battle it out for medals, for World Championship glory, and to qualify for their country at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. Enjoy the best moments at Szeged on the 2019 Sprint World Championships.

programme.title: Vendée Arctique - Highlights
programme.desc: Skippers are getting ready for the 2022 edition of the Vendée Arctique: the solo race that surrounds Iceland before returning back to Les Sables d'Olonne. Jérémie Beyou became the winner of the 2020 edition of this arduous competition, but seeing the trajectory of Charlie Dalin and Thomas Ruyant, competition is closest than ever. Unpredictability in weather forecasts will force organizers to cut the race short, meaning skippers are running out of time to reduce distances.

programme.title: Les Voiles De St Barth - Episode 1
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5

programme.title: Barcolana 50
programme.desc: For all sea and sailing lovers and those who would never miss this one-of-a-kind show, the place is always the same every year: Trieste. Founded in 1969 thanks to the initiative of the yacht club Società Velica di Barcola e Grignano, the Barcolana competition has won its worldwide renown.This year’s 50th edition will be packed with surprises: more than 400 offshore and onshore activities, the opportunity to admire the vessel Nave Vespucci, the Barcolana 50 special postage stamp, and the Frecce Tricolori airshow just a few minutes before the start of the race. Stunningly huge yachts and sailboats steered by sailing enthusiasts will compete in the Regatta to mark this special edition of Barcolana 50.Follow this year’s competition of Barcolana 50: the international regatta that has won the Guinness World Record for the greatest sailing race.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Ugljan – Ist – Silba
programme.desc: The island of Ugljan, right across the town of Zadar, is known for its olives and olive produce. Beautiful sandy beaches and crystal clear sea will take your breath away. Smaller island of the Zadar archipelago like Ist and Silba looks like frozen in time and are really great for escaping from civilization.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9 - Zadar Islands – Zadar
programme.desc: Small islands of Zadar archipelago are very popular for sailing and we will show you why. The town of Zadar was founded in Roman times and by every step through it you will stumble upon amazing heritage from the ancient times. Of course, we couldn't resist and we visited crazy funny Museum of Illusions.

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Surfing Games
programme.desc: Up to 200 surfers from 40 nations will battle for a medal in the ISA World Surfing Games 2017. Biarritz La Grande Plage will host the event, thus celebrating the 60th anniversary of surfing’s arrival in France. The athletes will compete for the titles: Men’s Individual, Women’s Individual, National World Champion, and Relay World Champion. Join us and have a taste of the high-performance surfing to come in Tokyo 2020!

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 4 - GP of Italy - Olbia

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Transat Jacques Vabre - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailors have already been in the water for a couple of days and tiredness is evident on their faces. Even if they compete in pairs, effort is constant and they have to be extremely tactical and careful with the strategic decisions they take on their route. Will Apivia win again in the extremely competitive IMOCA class? Let's find out what has happened this week in the 15th edition of the Transat Jacques Vabre.

programme.title: Transat Jacques Vabre - Episode 3
programme.desc: The final moments of this year's edition of the Transat Jacques Vabre is almost here! All classes are making their way to Martinique, and the Ultimes after their 7,500 nm journey are eager to set land on foot. All classes have been extremely competitive and there is still no clear victor this season. What will the outcome be like? Let's find out on the third and final episode of the 15th Transat Jacques Vabre.

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: Bart's Bash
programme.desc: The Bart’s Bash was created in an attempt to break the world record for the largest sailing race ever. Honouring America’s Cup great athlete Andrew “Bart” Simpson, this 24-hour race is compiled of thousands of sailors from over 60 countries set to take place at multiple ports. This fundraising race connects sailing communities across the globe and is sure to bring exciting competition all for a good cause. Sailing with a smile on their face, competitors rush across different venues raising money for the Andrew Simpson Foundation. The Foundations is driven by their belief that all young people should have the ability to excel and succeed in life and work, promoting health and well-being. Be part of this fundraising competition that yearly brings together thousands of people for a charitable cause.

programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Ugljan – Ist – Silba
programme.desc: The island of Ugljan, right across the town of Zadar, is known for its olives and olive produce. Beautiful sandy beaches and crystal clear sea will take your breath away. Smaller island of the Zadar archipelago like Ist and Silba looks like frozen in time and are really great for escaping from civilization.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9 - Zadar Islands – Zadar
programme.desc: Small islands of Zadar archipelago are very popular for sailing and we will show you why. The town of Zadar was founded in Roman times and by every step through it you will stumble upon amazing heritage from the ancient times. Of course, we couldn't resist and we visited crazy funny Museum of Illusions.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 3 World Championships Szeged
programme.desc: Welcome to the Canoe Sprint World Championships 2019 celebrated in Szeged, Hungary! Today there are about 1,200 athletes racing from approximately 98 nations, meaning this is the biggest World Championships canoe sprint racing has ever seen. We're about to witness the fastest paddlers on the planet battle it out for medals, for World Championship glory, and to qualify for their country at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. Enjoy the best moments at Szeged on the 2019 Sprint World Championships.

programme.title: Vendée Arctique - Highlights
programme.desc: Skippers are getting ready for the 2022 edition of the Vendée Arctique: the solo race that surrounds Iceland before returning back to Les Sables d'Olonne. Jérémie Beyou became the winner of the 2020 edition of this arduous competition, but seeing the trajectory of Charlie Dalin and Thomas Ruyant, competition is closest than ever. Unpredictability in weather forecasts will force organizers to cut the race short, meaning skippers are running out of time to reduce distances.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Surfing Games
programme.desc: Up to 200 surfers from 40 nations will battle for a medal in the ISA World Surfing Games 2017. Biarritz La Grande Plage will host the event, thus celebrating the 60th anniversary of surfing’s arrival in France. The athletes will compete for the titles: Men’s Individual, Women’s Individual, National World Champion, and Relay World Champion. Join us and have a taste of the high-performance surfing to come in Tokyo 2020!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 4 - GP of Italy - Olbia
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 4 - GP of Italy - Olbia

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3bis Freestyle Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the beautiful Olbia in the northeastern coast of Sardinia. Notoriously rough water conditions await as round two of the 2019 season will be raced at the Grand Prix of Italy. 150 riders from 30 countries raced in the different categories. We will be focusing on the Runabout and Freestyle divisions.Come join us in one of the most scenic and gorgeous corners of the Mediterranean island of Sardinia for the best aquabike action.

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 2 - Reality
programme.desc: Now closing in on Mexico and having spent nearly a month at sea, the crew are facing some realities they didn’t expect. It’s cold, it’s wet, and its nothing like what they were hoping. Adding to the chaos, Barry is emotionally lost and opens up about what he left behind to go on this trip. As the crew pokes around Catalina Island and down into Mexico a reckoning with what the trip is and what they wanted it to be is on the horizon and with it a new reality of life.

programme.title: Sofia
programme.desc: Sofía is a short documentary film about the life of young surfer Sofía De Tomás, Canary Islands’ surf champion. Originally from La Orotava, Tenerife, Sofia tells us through interviews and cinematic shoots about her surfing lifestyle and what inclined her towards the surf world.Sofia balances her time between painting and surfing, and for her painting has a similar effect sometimes as surfing. However, for Sofia, surfing is a sport that traps you, and once you start it, you can’t stop, you want more. It’s something she can’t live without.Live the beauty of the Canary Islands in this short documentary film about this young talent in the surf world. Sofia offers beautiful scenery, heart-warming moments and a strong desire to get on a board yourself and start surfing the world.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 3

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 4

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode Lapo arrives in Capraia, a beautiful island in the Tuscan Archipelago. Rich with volcanic soil Capraia produces some excellent wines, and harvests some unique plants that make rich flavours. Lapo will discover the island with a world champion spier fisherman who uses sustainable fishing methods to serve at his five star restaurant. Will he impress the hardest critiques when they sample his dish or will he fail to impress? As usual he is still trying to win over his Captain.

programme.title: Endless Summer In Norfolk
programme.desc: Norfolk: population to just over 240,000 people and neighbour of the Chesapeake Bay is one of the top nautical destination for many enthusiasts in the USA. Holding a strong historical heritage and home to the largest naval base in the world, nautical sports are practiced regularly in this city in Virginia. Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer heads to Virginia to discover Norfolk and what makes it so important in the nautical world. A port city on the Chesapeake Bay, bordering the Atlantic Ocean and countless rivers in its backyard, you just can't get away from the water. Discover some of the incredible 144 miles of coastline in the heart of Virginia with Lucia Metzbauer.Get ready to live an Endless Summer in Norfolk on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Skeleton Sea
programme.desc: João and Xandi, two surfers in their early 50′s, have been working together for 25 years. They clean beaches and with the trash they pick they create the most stunning artwork. However, living as an artist and idealist in Portugal is not economically profitable and, therefore, not easy.Their family life is affected by the choices they make and their wish to raise awareness about the ever-growing pollution in our oceans. Skeleton Sea takes us on their personal journey to help people understand the importance of our oceans to help us take the step to change our habits to keep them clean. As all live comes from the sea, Skeleton Sea reminds us that this powerful force has the ability of taking it away from us as well.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing Deejay continues its journey in Ibiza and the nearing islands to the rhythm of the night! Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer heads to Virginia to discover Norfolk and what makes it so important in the nautical world. A port city on the Chesapeake Bay, bordering the Atlantic Ocean and countless rivers in its backyard, you just can't get away from the water. Discover some of the incredible 144 miles of coastline in the heart of Virginia with Lucia Metzbauer.Get ready to live an Endless Summer in Norfolk on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 3 World Championships Szeged
programme.desc: Welcome to the Canoe Sprint World Championships 2019 celebrated in Szeged, Hungary! Today there are about 1,200 athletes racing from approximately 98 nations, meaning this is the biggest World Championships canoe sprint racing has ever seen. We're about to witness the fastest paddlers on the planet battle it out for medals, for World Championship glory, and to qualify for their country at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. Enjoy the best moments at Szeged on the 2019 Sprint World Championships.

programme.title: Vendée Arctique - Highlights
programme.desc: Skippers are getting ready for the 2022 edition of the Vendée Arctique: the solo race that surrounds Iceland before returning back to Les Sables d'Olonne. Jérémie Beyou became the winner of the 2020 edition of this arduous competition, but seeing the trajectory of Charlie Dalin and Thomas Ruyant, competition is closest than ever. Unpredictability in weather forecasts will force organizers to cut the race short, meaning skippers are running out of time to reduce distances.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.2 - SPLIT - BOL

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Surfing Games
programme.desc: Up to 200 surfers from 40 nations will battle for a medal in the ISA World Surfing Games 2017. Biarritz La Grande Plage will host the event, thus celebrating the 60th anniversary of surfing’s arrival in France. The athletes will compete for the titles: Men’s Individual, Women’s Individual, National World Champion, and Relay World Champion. Join us and have a taste of the high-performance surfing to come in Tokyo 2020!

programme.title: Rediscover North America
programme.desc: Six friends decide to cross 12 states on their canoe, embarking on the adventure of a lifetime. From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10 - Mali Losinj - Opatija
programme.desc: In this episode we take you to the Mali Losinj on Losinj island and we will visit unique museum with only one but very important piece, enjoy delicious gastronomy and show you all the beauties of Mali Loinj. Opatija is known as a high-class tourist resort but we will explore some more interesting adrenaline and nature attractions.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 11 - Crikvenica – Novi Vinodolski
programme.desc: Crikvenica is known for its beautiful beaches and enjoyable holiday destinations for the whole family. We'll take you to some very interesting places and amaze you with healthy nature gastronomy. Novi Vinodolski is becoming nautical centre of the Northern Adriatic with 2 new marinas and in this episode we'll show you where to go, what to see and other places of interest.

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - Episode 1
programme.desc: Monaco Yacht Show - Episode 1

programme.title: Nautical Adventure In A Landlocked Country
programme.desc: Switzerland: home to the Alps and important water competitions like the Bol d’Or Mirabaud, the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Today it becomes the chosen scenario for this Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country. From extreme wakeboarding to canoe polo, we will discover that, despite being located far from the sea, Switzerland has a vibrant nautical scene.Get ready to accompany Nautical Channel’s host, Lucia Metzbauer, as she goes wakeboarding with local Swiss pros, learns about the annual Match Race regatta, tries her hand at Stand-Up-Paddle, and discovers the little known sport of Canoe Polo! This country has much to offer, so don’t miss out on its beautiful scenery that will have you pack your bags to come visit on the first occasion.Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country reminds us that water sports can be practiced even in countries that do not border the ocean. An inland fanta-sea for those nautical intrepids that are looking for ways of widening their horizons. Welcome to the Alps.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 5

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6
programme.desc: Who is J.O.B - Episode 6

Jérémie Beyou became the winner of the 2020 edition of this arduous competition, but seeing the trajectory of Charlie Dalin and Thomas Ruyant, competition is closest than ever. Unpredictability in weather forecasts will force organizers to cut the race short, meaning skippers are running out of time to reduce distances.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 2 - Reality
programme.desc: Now closing in on Mexico and having spent nearly a month at sea, the crew are facing some realities they didn’t expect. It’s cold, it’s wet, and its nothing like what they were hoping. Adding to the chaos, Barry is emotionally lost and opens up about what he left behind to go on this trip. As the crew pokes around Catalina Island and down into Mexico a reckoning with what the trip is and what they wanted it to be is on the horizon and with it a new reality of life.

programme.title: Sofia
programme.desc: Sofía is a short documentary film about the life of young surfer Sofía De Tomás, Canary Islands’ surf champion. Originally from La Orotava, Tenerife, Sofia tells us through interviews and cinematic shoots about her surfing lifestyle and what inclined her towards the surf world.Sofia balances her time between painting and surfing, and for her painting has a similar effect sometimes as surfing. However, for Sofia, surfing is a sport that traps you, and once you start it, you can’t stop, you want more. It’s something she can’t live without.Live the beauty of the Canary Islands in this short documentary film about this young talent in the surf world. Sofia offers beautiful scenery, heart-warming moments and a strong desire to get on a board yourself and start surfing the world.

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 8

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 4 - GP of Italy - Olbia
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 4 - GP of Italy - Olbia

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3bis Freestyle Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the beautiful Olbia in the northeastern coast of Sardinia. Notoriously rough water conditions await as round two of the 2019 season will be raced at the Grand Prix of Italy. 150 riders from 30 countries raced in the different categories. We will be focusing on the Runabout and Freestyle divisions.Come join us in one of the most scenic and gorgeous corners of the Mediterranean island of Sardinia for the best aquabike action.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10 - Mali Losinj - Opatija
programme.desc: In this episode we take you to the Mali Losinj on Losinj island and we will visit unique museum with only one but very important piece, enjoy delicious gastronomy and show you all the beauties of Mali Loinj. programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode Lapo arrives in Capraia, a beautiful island in the Tuscan Archipelago. Rich with volcanic soil Capraia produces some excellent wines, and harvests some unique plants that make rich flavours. Lapo will discover the island with a world champion spier fisherman who uses sustainable fishing methods to serve at his five star restaurant. Will he impress the hardest critiques when they sample his dish or will he fail to impress? As usual he is still trying to win over his Captain.

programme.title: Endless Summer In Norfolk
programme.desc: Norfolk: population to just over 240,000 people and neighbour of the Chesapeake Bay is one of the top nautical destination for many enthusiasts in the USA. Holding a strong historical heritage and home to the largest naval base in the world, nautical sports are practiced regularly in this city in Virginia. Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer heads to Virginia to discover Norfolk and what makes it so important in the nautical world. A port city on the Chesapeake Bay, bordering the Atlantic Ocean and countless rivers in its backyard, you just can't get away from the water. Discover some of the incredible 144 miles of coastline in the heart of Virginia with Lucia Metzbauer.Get ready to live an Endless Summer in Norfolk on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 7 - Monaco
programme.desc: Monaco shines with glamour, luxury and exciting competitions, like the seventh leg of the 2021 Longines Global Champions Tour. We are halfway through the competition, and the standings are still changing. Ben Maher won in Paris, but more riders are proving to be challenging opponents this year. Rewatch the highlights of the competition in Monaco, on HorseTV.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 7 - Monaco
programme.desc: Monaco is the scenery for the seventh leg of the Global Champions League. St Tropez Pirates won the CSI5* competition at Paris, but Valkenswaard United is still at the lead of the overall standings of the competition. Will another team rise and shine in Monaco, or will it be another victory for Valkenswaard United? Find out now in the seventh leg of the 2021 GCL.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 3 - Teams on Top
programme.desc: Team jumping competitions started in 1909, and in 1929 FEI created the Nations Cup. Since, the sport has evolved to become a dynamic competition. In this episode, we will look back at some of most iconic wins in the FEI Jumping Nations Cup. Watch how it has evolved from its military background to the electrifying sport we watch today.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the first episode of Campus Life Experience, we are in Umbria ready to meet our students: Lorenzo, Margherita, Michelangelo, Elena, Michela, Caterina, Giacomo, Alessandra, Alessandro and Larissa. They are about to ride into a new challenge and learn everything about their equine friends. Come join us!

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 5
programme.desc: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 5

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 5 - Boekelo
programme.desc: Boekelo, in The Netherlands, is the last stop of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021. Team Sweden wants to repeat their victory from 2019 and as defending champions they will deliver a top sport performance. However, Great Britain is on the lead of this leg with 80.8 points thanks to the stellar performance of Fox-Pitt and Nicola Wilson. Will this be enough to earn the title? Find out now in the final leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021.

programme.title: Polo Masters Cup Dubai - Episode 1
programme.desc: Polo Masters Cup Dubai - Episode 1

programme.title: Warwickshire Cup - Final Lovelocks vs Monterosso Vikings
programme.desc: The Warwickshire Cup, organized by Cirencester Park Polo Club, is one of the most prestigious events in the English high handicap. Teams of 4 people compete in this event to raise above their heads the Cup. At the end, only a team can remain. Don't miss out on the 2020 final of Lovelocks vs. Monterosso Vikings.

programme.title: Badminton Horse Trials
programme.desc: From May 1 to 5 the CCI 5 stars Badminton Horse Trials once again met all the expectations. Three thrilling clashes had to be overwhelmed, dressage, cross country and show jumping. Relive all the action here, with us.

programme.title: Jumping International Bordeaux - Grand Prix Land Rover
programme.desc: The CSI5*W Grand Prix Land Rover Trophée is one of the most awaited competitions in the Jumping International de Bordeaux. With a height of 1.60m, it is one of the toughest tests in the French event. Riders will have to show their perseverance, effort and speed in the obstacle course in order to get a spot in the podium.Relieve the best moments of the Grand Prix Land Rover 2019 edition.

programme.title: CSI2* Maeza Grand Prix - Grand Prix
programme.desc: Welcome to the Yeguada Finca Maeza, the international host for this incredible competition. In Asturias and surrounded by the most characteristic landscape, it wraps in a captivating silence. For two weekends the Maeza family welcomes riders and horses from all over the world openly. Who has what it takes to win? Find out now the highlights of the competition at Maeza, on HorseTV.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Week 1
programme.desc: During 5 weeks, the Sunshine Tour holds an exciting competition with a total of 2452 horses passing through its facilities, 734 riders and 50 different nationalities all together to celebrate this show in horse jumping. This first week includes the categories CSIYH* to CSI2*, and riders will be able to get a first impression of what competition will be like the following weeks.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Campus Life Experience, Laura gets on the site and checks everything is cleaned properly and in order. She teaches us how to disinfect wraps to protect horses from diseases. Then, we go for a walk with the horses and try different exercises to work on the horse-rider combination.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 3
programme.desc: Laura Conz starts this episode making sure all students have their helmets on to avoid any accidents before teaching them regarding horses health and how to take care of their legs. Then, both horse and rider will be receiving ultrasound massage to help their circulation flow properly before learning more health tips from their teachers.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 5 - Boekelo
programme.desc: Boekelo, in The Netherlands, is the last stop of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021. Team Sweden wants to repeat their victory from 2019 and as defending champions they will deliver a top sport performance. However, Great Britain is on the lead of this leg with 80.8 points thanks to the stellar performance of Fox-Pitt and Nicola Wilson. Will this be enough to earn the title? Find out now in the final leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Dos Lunas Polo Club vs Evviva Polo Saint-Moritz
programme.desc: Dos Lunas Polo Club is facing Evviva Polo Saint-Moritz in this heated game at the Polo Rider Cup 2021. Playing with a 10/12 goals handicap and 5 chukkers, both teams will try their best to keep advancing in the tournament, but it will not be an easy feat. Watch the best moments of the competition.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Campus Life Experience, Laura gets on the site and checks everything is cleaned properly and in order. She teaches us how to disinfect wraps to protect horses from diseases. Then, we go for a walk with the horses and try different exercises to work on the horse-rider combination.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 3
programme.desc: Laura Conz starts this episode making sure all students have their helmets on to avoid any accidents before teaching them regarding horses health and how to take care of their legs. Then, both horse and rider will be receiving ultrasound massage to help their circulation flow properly before learning more health tips from their teachers.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 9 - London
programme.desc: The Longines Global Champions Tour moves to London, United Kingdom, for the ninth leg of the championship. The Spanish rider Sergio Alvarez Moya, together with Alamo, won in Berlin and moved to the first spot of the LGCT. Will he keep his spot for long? Find it out on the London competition of the LGCT 2021.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 9 - London
programme.desc: London is calling! And so is the Global Champions League that seems to stop time across the English metropolis. Eyes are set on Paris Panthers, who seem to be on a winning streak in the championship. Will they repeat once more their victory, or is fate written another way? Find out in the ninth leg of the 2021 Global Champions League.

Millstreet in Ireland is the chosen venue this time, and the Cross-Country Course in the adjoining Drishane Castle Demesne has quickly established itself as a favourite amongst the best riders of the world. Be part of the best moments of the competition at Millstreet.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Dos Lunas Polo Club vs Evviva Polo Saint-Moritz
programme.desc: Dos Lunas Polo Club is facing Evviva Polo Saint-Moritz in this heated game at the Polo Rider Cup 2021. Playing with a 10/12 goals handicap and 5 chukkers, both teams will try their best to keep advancing in the tournament, but it will not be an easy feat. Watch the best moments of the competition.

programme.title: German High Goal Polo Championship - German High Goal Polo Championship
programme.desc: The German Polo Tour has been the top polo league in Germany since 2010. Now, rivalling teams will have to compete in the Prussian & Country Club Berlin-Brandenburg for the Cup. The final between Carfactory and Riller & Schmauck is now on. Enjoy the competition and follow the top level of german polo in Horse TV.

programme.title: Sharjah Ruler Cup - Summary
programme.desc: HorseTV gets on the saddle of the competition to learn more about the 2020 HH Ruler of Sharjah Cup. This 5* event is crucial for Arab riders who want to qualify and fly to Las Vegas for the FEI World Cup Final. Come join us while we unveil the best moments of the competition, discover new facts and interview the riders in the HH Ruler of Sharjah Cup 2020.
