programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Patience
programme.desc: For many of us, patience does not come naturally. this class brings us an opportunity to understand patience through the twisting posture Marichasana C. Join Kino as she guides you into embodiment through breath awareness and gentle movement. Be patient and kind with your body as you move into the practice and a deeper twist through the spinal axis.

programme.title: Yoga Is Stillness
programme.desc: One of the key lessons of yoga is stillness, known as Nirodaha in Sanskrit. We will use the headstand position to practice approaching situations with calm and serenity. This class will help you build a strong base and increase awareness in the parts of your body that will support this inversion, especially the core. Don’t be afraid as we approach this challenge, Kino will offer variations so that all levels can experience the meditative stillness of headstand.

programme.title: Yoga, Money & Conscious Living With Sandy Fernandez
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Sandy Fernandez, founder of Karmic Currency.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Breakfast for Your Dosha
programme.desc: Today you are going to learn how to start your day in the most effective way according to Ayurveda. Find out why it’s important to have a nourishing breakfast that’s designed for your specific mind-body type. Plus, this episode offers three Smoothie Bowl recipes – one for each of the doshas – that will nourish your body and set the tone for a great day. Less than 40 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: Channel Id 3

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Yoga Is Love
programme.desc: Today's practice is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.

programme.title: Utthita Hasta Padangusthasana
programme.desc: This practice starts with breath awareness before moving into a prop supported physical practice. Use a chair to make the challenge of balance work more accessible.

programme.title: Lolasana
programme.desc: This flow uses a chair supported sun salutation to get you started then flows through standing poses before finishing up with some accessible work in the arm balance Lolasana

Allow the natural intelligence of the inner body to shine cultivate of deep awareness of the intimate, inner space of the body in this 30 minute practice.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for a short, gentle practice that is centered around core engagement and the plank pose

programme.desc: Channel Id 3

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Personal Relationships
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships. Begin your practice of mindful awareness by feeling the breath. Allow the breath to become an anchor that redirects the mind to the inner experience. Check in with the physical body and the sensations arising there and filtering into awareness. Tap into the energy of the heart and the love that flows there, allow this feeling to spread to all beings and yourself.

programme.title: Yoga Is Unity
programme.desc: The traditional definition of yoga is unity. We will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose. Begin practice with a reflection on the connection between breath, body and mind. Next, move through a series of long holds in child’s pose, puppy poses and forward folding. Take a supported hip opener using props if you have them handy and then move into another long hold, this time in Pigeon Pose. Take note of any sensations and feelings that arise, offering yourself true care and opening up to a sense of wholeness.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Yoga Is Joy
programme.desc: Open your heart to an experience of pure joy. We’ll use Happy Baby pose to explore what yoga truly is. Flow through child’s pose, puppy pose, squats and hip openers before making your way into the sweet release of Happy Baby. No judgement, no fight, no force… use this practice to touch the unscathed, joyful innocence within you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Sanctuary
programme.desc: Today’s lesson is about sanctuary and how to find a place of calm and peace deep within yourself. We’ll use the backbend Ustrasana, or Camel Pose, to dive into that inner world. Kino will guide you through warm ups and then a series of backbends that will challenge you. The idea is to work outside of your comfort zone, just a little, so you seek a source of strength from deep within. As you embrace the challenge you can also embrace a sense of sanctuary and connect to an inner space of faith and grace.

programme.title: Yoga and Indian Culture with Ajay Tokas
programme.desc: In this episode of seek up, Kino sits down to talk with level 2 authorized yoga teacher, Ajay Tokas.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Healing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a Yoga Nidra practice is designed to promote healing in the body from the inside out.

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Yoga Is Breath
programme.desc: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self. This class uses chair pose to explore both physical embodiment and to fuel our inner journey into yoga. Join us for a practice that will bring awareness into your hips and legs, using props to support the postures where needed. Let Kino guide you into a stronger awareness of Agni, the inner fire that burns through impurities and helps the mind see clearer.

programme.title: Get Your Yoga On Trailer
programme.desc: Get Your Yoga On Trailer

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Pigeon
programme.desc: Come explore supported hip opening with Kino. This class incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Pigeon Pose.

programme.title: Body Intelligence Trailer
programme.desc: Body Intelligence Trailer

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships. Begin your practice of mindful awareness by feeling the breath. Allow the breath to become an anchor that redirects the mind to the inner experience. Check in with the physical body and the sensations arising there and filtering into awareness. Tap into the energy of the heart and the love that flows there, allow this feeling to spread to all beings and yourself.

programme.title: Yoga Is Unity
programme.desc: The traditional definition of yoga is unity. We will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose. Begin practice with a reflection on the connection between breath, body and mind. Next, move through a series of long holds in child’s pose, puppy poses and forward folding. Take a supported hip opener using props if you have them handy and then move into another long hold, this time in Pigeon Pose. Take note of any sensations and feelings that arise, offering yourself true care and opening up to a sense of wholeness.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Yoga Is Joy
programme.desc: Open your heart to an experience of pure joy. We’ll use Happy Baby pose to explore what yoga truly is. Flow through child’s pose, puppy pose, squats and hip openers before making your way into the sweet release of Happy Baby. No judgement, no fight, no force… use this practice to touch the unscathed, joyful innocence within you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Sanctuary
programme.desc: Today’s lesson is about sanctuary and how to find a place of calm and peace deep within yourself. We’ll use the backbend Ustrasana, or Camel Pose, to dive into that inner world. Kino will guide you through warm ups and then a series of backbends that will challenge you. The idea is to work outside of your comfort zone, just a little, so you seek a source of strength from deep within. As you embrace the challenge you can also embrace a sense of sanctuary and connect to an inner space of faith and grace.

programme.title: Yoga and Indian Culture with Ajay Tokas
programme.desc: In this episode of seek up, Kino sits down to talk with level 2 authorized yoga teacher, Ajay Tokas.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Healing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a Yoga Nidra practice is designed to promote healing in the body from the inside out.

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Yoga Is Breath
programme.desc: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self. This class uses chair pose to explore both physical embodiment and to fuel our inner journey into yoga. Join us for a practice that will bring awareness into your hips and legs, using props to support the postures where needed. Let Kino guide you into a stronger awareness of Agni, the inner fire that burns through impurities and helps the mind see clearer.

programme.title: Get Your Yoga On Trailer
programme.desc: Get Your Yoga On Trailer

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Pigeon
programme.desc: Come explore supported hip opening with Kino. This class incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Pigeon Pose.

programme.title: Body Intelligence Trailer
programme.desc: Body Intelligence Trailer

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer

programme.title: Material relationships
programme.desc: Start your meditation practice with a few moments of mindful awareness built around the movement of the breath and the sensations of the body. Cultivate equanimity as you notice the rise and fall of physical and emotional feelings. Let Kino help you drop down beneath the frequency of thought, where you can get in touch with your innate wholeness. Work with understanding your natural completeness, as you explore concepts of attachment and aversion. Find yourself in alignment with faith, breaking the inertia of limiting beliefs and thoughts. Practice towards a state of non attachment, a fertile ground in which to plant the seeds of a happier, more peaceful life.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Connecting to the Soul
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with Koya Webb about her southern roots and her California life.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: Naturally Bliss Trailer

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Alfredo Mushroom Pasta
programme.desc: Vegan fettuccine alfredo is easier to make than you might think.

programme.title: Avocado Fudge Brownies
programme.desc: These avocado fudge brownies are so rich and decadent; you won’t believe they’re vegan!

programme.title: Yoga Is Joy
programme.desc: Open your heart to an experience of pure joy. We’ll use Happy Baby pose to explore what yoga truly is. Flow through child’s pose, puppy pose, squats and hip openers before making your way into the sweet release of Happy Baby. No judgement, no fight, no force… use this practice to touch the unscathed, joyful innocence within you.

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Drills Trailer

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Healing and Happiness
programme.desc: Begin practice with a few minutes of mindfulness, feeling the breath and sensation in the body as a way of cultivating inward focus. Shift into a contemplative state, settling the mind below the frequency of thought. Learn to label inner processes in a way that will help you understand the nature of thought and emotion. As the quality of your awareness shifts deeper, Kino will skillfully guide you into a state of contemplation. This practice will help you process emotion and move towards healing and happiness.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - A conversation about communication
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with mediator and coach Mia Forbes Pirie. Mia discusses her approach to mediation and gives advice about how to use curiosity to navigate interpersonal conflict. Explore techniques to help you approach life with patience and compassion of yourself and others.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - How to quiet our mind
programme.desc: True peace is something that exists inside of you at all times, but the only way to access this peace is by learning to quiet the mind. So how do you do it? Watch the video to find out!

programme.title: Parsvottanasana
programme.desc: This 20 minute practice starts with the basics, building a connection to breath and body. Flow through standing poses that build up to a prop supported variation of Parsvottanasana.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.title: Yoga Is Commitment
programme.desc: This class centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in. The intention here is to get you on your mat every day, even if you don’t make it through the whole class, so that you can cultivate greater awareness of your body and mind. In this class we’ll build up to a steady, well constructed Down Dog by focusing on the shoulders in a series of preparatory postures. Flow through child's pose, table top, puppy pose and sun salutations as you create healthy patterns of movement and breath control. The commitment you make to the practice is really a statement of your self worth. Join Kino on the mat and say: I am worth it! I am worth these few moments of precious practice.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Breath
programme.desc: Join Kino for a gentle meditation on the beach by the beautiful shores of Tulum, Mexico. Let go of your thoughts, and experiences as you use the breath to anchor you to the present moment.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Body
programme.desc: This is a seaside meditation on the peaceful shores of Tulum, Mexico, guided by Kino MacGregor. Bring your awareness to the gift of your body and move deeply into the inner space of this sacred vessel that carries you through this life.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Build it up
programme.desc: Build up your strength by building a powerful core. Kino guides you through a plank-focused practice that includes side planks, floating planks, and chaturanga (four-limbed staff pose). You'll ignite your inner fire in this short effective class.

programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Discipline
programme.desc: Don’t be intimidated, but today’s lesson is on discipline. This class is all about how to get on your mat with discipline and enjoy it. To find comfort and determination in Navasana Kino will guide you towards just the right amount of front body engagement as well as a helpful awareness in the deep core. Mix your discipline with a fun loving attitude and feel that energy that comes when you rise up to a challenge. Tap into a place of infinite strength within, a place of spiritual fortitude, a strength rooted in the beyond

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - On the path
programme.desc: Join Kino and Rob Mack for a discussion about how to use your thoughts to put you on the path to your highest potential. Learn practical steps to help you harness the power of your mind to be happier. Hear Rob’s story about how he struggled with depression and found his way to the joy he experiences now.

programme.title: Boredom in Yoga
programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: Naturally Bliss Trailer

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Ashtanga Yoga Sadhana with David Robson
programme.desc: Join Kino for a conversation with David Robson!

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Power up the shoulders
programme.desc: Learn the yoga drills you need for powerful shoulders in this class with Kino. A strong core and shoulders are the foundation of arm balances in your practice. Work on plank and navasana (boat pose) drills. You’ll also learn drills for hip flexibility, working toward titibhasana (firefly pose).

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Yoga Is Balance
programme.desc: This class is about finding balance. Begin with some mindful warmups focused on giving you a sense of embodiment. Explore foundational alignment for balance by feeling the relationship between the pelvis, the central axis of the spine and the rest of the body. Carry that intention of getting acquainted with oneself into today’s focus, the tree pose. Kino will guide you through various modifications, using props where helpful, so that you can find a connection to your own steadiness and vitality.

programme.desc: A flow that thoroughly warms up the spine and builds up to the laying backbend called Shalabhasana.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Light the Fire – Downward Dog
programme.desc: If you're feeling not so flexible, this course is where you should be! This class is focused on understanding shoulder mobility in the fundamental yoga asana called downdog,

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Something for Everyone – Half Moon
programme.desc: Today for yoga for inflexible people is a chair based practice that will help you stretch and strengthen in a supported way. Join Kino as she starts with a mindful moment and then flows through a sequence that includes lots of forward folds and side stretches.

programme.title: Yoga Is Discipline
programme.desc: Don’t be intimidated, but today’s lesson is on discipline. This class is all about how to get on your mat with discipline and enjoy it. To find comfort and determination in Navasana Kino will guide you towards just the right amount of front body engagement as well as a helpful awareness in the deep core. Mix your discipline with a fun loving attitude and feel that energy that comes when you rise up to a challenge. Tap into a place of infinite strength within, a place of spiritual fortitude, a strength rooted in the beyond

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - On the path
programme.desc: Join Kino and Rob Mack for a discussion about how to use your thoughts to put you on the path to your highest potential. Learn practical steps to help you harness the power of your mind to be happier. Hear Rob’s story about how he struggled with depression and found his way to the joy he experiences now.

programme.title: Boredom in Yoga
programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.title: Ashtanga Yoga Sadhana with David Robson
programme.desc: Join Kino for a conversation with David Robson!

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Power up the shoulders
programme.desc: Learn the yoga drills you need for powerful shoulders in this class with Kino. A strong core and shoulders are the foundation of arm balances in your practice. Work on plank and navasana (boat pose) drills. You’ll also learn drills for hip flexibility, working toward titibhasana (firefly pose).

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Yoga Is Balance
programme.desc: This class is about finding balance. Begin with some mindful warmups focused on giving you a sense of embodiment. Explore foundational alignment for balance by feeling the relationship between the pelvis, the central axis of the spine and the rest of the body. Carry that intention of getting acquainted with oneself into today’s focus, the tree pose. Kino will guide you through various modifications, using props where helpful, so that you can find a connection to your own steadiness and vitality.

programme.title: Health
programme.desc: Tune into the breath as an entry way to the present moment. Use this awareness to call your energy back into yourself and cultivate an increasing sense of wellbeing. Feel the sensation of the body and practice acceptance of whatever pleasant or unpleasantness arises. Focus the mind and notice the quality and texture of your thoughts and emotions. Once you settle into practice turn your awareness more fully to the inner experience, planting the seeds of happiness and wellbeing.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Shoulders and core
programme.desc: Give your strength and confidence a boost when you do this class with Kino. Challenge yourself with floating plank and dolphin plank. Build integrity in the core as you practice navasana (boat pose).

programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Channel Id 2
programme.desc: Channel Id 2

programme.title: Yoga Is Practice
programme.desc: Abhyasa is the sanskrit word for practice. Kino wants to help you find the playful spirit in your heart, even as you commit to practice. Begin the class with breath awareness and some mindful movement. After we warm up we’ll play with forearm plank and leg engagement before moving into the challenge of full Dolphin Pose. Finish class with some reflection on the power of practice and a well earned rest

programme.title: Yoga Is Prayer
programme.desc: Todays class offers an opportunity to understand practice as prayer. Join Kino as she uses Digasana, also known as Warrior 3, as an opportunity to feel the quiet turning inward of the mind. The Warrior postures help you connect to a sense of inner strength. Let Kino guide you through communion with self and you higher power as you flow through a challenging, prop supported balancing sequence.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - How to recharge
programme.desc: Join Kino and Rob Mack for a candid discussion about spiritual burnout and compassion fatigue. Learn how health professionals and people in “giving” professions can find balance and prevent burnout. Find out how each of them recharges when they begin to feel depleted.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara
programme.desc: Get to know Sahara Rose, author, podcast host, speaker and Ayurvedic student/educator. Find out how she first came to discover Ayurveda and how she learned to incorporate the practices of this ancient system into her everyday life to heal herself from the inside out.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Discover Your Dosha
programme.desc: Why does Ayurveda matter and how can it help you understand yourself and the world around you? In this episode, Sahara will briefly discuss each of the three doshas and what they have to do with you and the foods you eat? Learn about how your digestion can be affected by the doshas, and how the doshas might be affecting you through this brief intro to Ayurveda with Sahara Rose. Less that 20 minutes.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Breakfast for Your Dosha
programme.desc: Today you are going to learn how to start your day in the most effective way according to Ayurveda. Find out why it’s important to have a nourishing breakfast that’s designed for your specific mind-body type. Plus, this episode offers three Smoothie Bowl recipes – one for each of the doshas – that will nourish your body and set the tone for a great day. Less than 40 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Core, Shoulders and Splits
programme.desc: Join Kino for a yoga drills class that includes a mix of strength and flexibility. You’ll build a strong core with plank and navasana (boat pose) drills. You’ll also do some hip releases with a focus on hip extension. Next, Kino will guide you through a series of poses to help you progress from crescent lunge to supported splits to full front splits.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Try Your Triangle – Triangle Pose
programme.desc: Try out the triangle pose! Today's class will explore this foundational asana through both chair and mat based variations. Under Kino's expert guidance you will get comfortable with the physical practice and start to feel a deep, intentional gratitude too!

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Awaken the Spine – Cobra Pose
programme.desc: This powerful practice with Kino will awaken the spine, helping you feel healthier and happier. Begin with a mindful moment and then flow through a fun sequence of mat based core-strengthening and backbending postures.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Is Trailer

programme.title: Yoga Is Awakening
programme.desc: Yoga is a path to personal awakening. In today’s lesson we will use the crescent lunge to awaken the energy at the core of your being. Begin with centering breath work and then flow through some warm ups and sun salutations as you bring awareness to the energetic life of the body. Take it nice and easy as you make your way into Anjaneyasana, finding and being at peace with your individual limits in the posture. Kino will guide you into feeling the sensation in the hips and spine, noticing the changes in the body and and letting the practice fuel a sense of awakening.

programme.title: Yoga Is Unity
programme.desc: The traditional definition of yoga is unity. We will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose. Begin practice with a reflection on the connection between breath, body and mind. Next, move through a series of long holds in child’s pose, puppy poses and forward folding. Take a supported hip opener using props if you have them handy and then move into another long hold, this time in Pigeon Pose. Take note of any sensations and feelings that arise, offering yourself true care and opening up to a sense of wholeness.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - A conversation about communication
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with mediator and coach Mia Forbes Pirie. Mia discusses her approach to mediation and gives advice about how to use curiosity to navigate interpersonal conflict. Explore techniques to help you approach life with patience and compassion of yourself and others.

programme.title: Creamy Curry Ramen
programme.desc: This Ramen Curry dish is easy to make and perfect for when you’re craving some vegan Thai food.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Meet Robert Mack
programme.desc: Get to know a little about Robert Mack, including what led him to becoming a happiness coach, and what he finds inspiring about seeking happiness in life.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Intro
programme.desc: Learn a little bit about what this course’s 8 videos are all about and how to watch and get the most value out of them.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - My experience + how I have come to become a happiness coach
programme.desc: This video will give you a little more background about Robert Mack, and how he got to where he is today as a Happiness Coach. Plus, learn some interesting facts about the rates that people of this day and age are experiencing success and anxiety.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Happiness is the master key to success
programme.desc: According to Robert Mack, even though we may think it does, success doesn’t lead to happiness. Learn a little more about why this is the case, and a little bit about why happiness is actually what leads to success.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Lunch for your Dosha
programme.desc: In this episode, Sahara Rose will teach you how to make a very simple Lunch Bowl that will energize your body and optimize your digestion. Plus, you’ll learn about Ayurveda’s theory of the six tastes, how to use the six tastes when constructing a meal, and what ingredients to add or avoid depending on your dosha. Less than 15 minutes. programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Vata
programme.desc: Did you know that different yoga and meditation practices are recommended for the different doshas? Join Sahara Rose for a meditation that’s designed for Vata Dosha individuals. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Seated Sequence
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that explores the patterns of the seated postures from the Ashtanga Yoga Primary series.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Is Trailer

programme.title: Yoga Is Awakening
programme.desc: Yoga is a path to personal awakening. In today’s lesson we will use the crescent lunge to awaken the energy at the core of your being. Begin with centering breath work and then flow through some warm ups and sun salutations as you bring awareness to the energetic life of the body. Take it nice and easy as you make your way into Anjaneyasana, finding and being at peace with your individual limits in the posture. Kino will guide you into feeling the sensation in the hips and spine, noticing the changes in the body and and letting the practice fuel a sense of awakening.

programme.title: Yoga Is Unity
programme.desc: The traditional definition of yoga is unity. We will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose. Begin practice with a reflection on the connection between breath, body and mind. Next, move through a series of long holds in child’s pose, puppy poses and forward folding. Take a supported hip opener using props if you have them handy and then move into another long hold, this time in Pigeon Pose. Take note of any sensations and feelings that arise, offering yourself true care and opening up to a sense of wholeness.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - A conversation about communication
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with mediator and coach Mia Forbes Pirie. Mia discusses her approach to mediation and gives advice about how to use curiosity to navigate interpersonal conflict. Explore techniques to help you approach life with patience and compassion of yourself and others.

programme.title: Creamy Curry Ramen
programme.desc: This Ramen Curry dish is easy to make and perfect for when you’re craving some vegan Thai food.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Meet Robert Mack
programme.desc: Get to know a little about Robert Mack, including what led him to becoming a happiness coach, and what he finds inspiring about seeking happiness in life.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Intro
programme.desc: Learn a little bit about what this course’s 8 videos are all about and how to watch and get the most value out of them.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - My experience + how I have come to become a happiness coach
programme.desc: This video will give you a little more background about Robert Mack, and how he got to where he is today as a Happiness Coach. Plus, learn some interesting facts about the rates that people of this day and age are experiencing success and anxiety.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Happiness is the master key to success
programme.desc: According to Robert Mack, even though we may think it does, success doesn’t lead to happiness. Learn a little more about why this is the case, and a little bit about why happiness is actually what leads to success.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara
programme.desc: Get to know Sahara Rose, author, podcast host, speaker and Ayurvedic student/educator. Find out how she first came to discover Ayurveda and how she learned to incorporate the practices of this ancient system into her everyday life to heal herself from the inside out.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Lunch for your Dosha
programme.desc: In this episode, Sahara Rose will teach you how to make a very simple Lunch Bowl that will energize your body and optimize your digestion. Plus, you’ll learn about Ayurveda’s theory of the six tastes, how to use the six tastes when constructing a meal, and what ingredients to add or avoid depending on your dosha. Less than 15 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Vata
programme.desc: Did you know that different yoga and meditation practices are recommended for the different doshas? Join Sahara Rose for a meditation that’s designed for Vata Dosha individuals. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Jackfruit Green Enchiladas with Cashew Crema v2
programme.desc: Jackfruit Green Enchiladas with Cashew Crema v2

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Hip Flexion and Extension
programme.desc: Focus on opening the front of the hips for splits in this yoga drills class with Kino. Warm up with shoulder drills in tabletop pose and bird dog drills. Strengthen your glutes and release your hips with standing splits. Work on strength and flexibility of the hamstrings, hips, and quads in variations of heron pose.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Marichasana A
programme.desc: Tune in to the inner experience in this short flow that details a healthy use of breath and body in your yoga practice. This class builds up to Marichasana A.

programme.title: Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: A restorative flow that stretches and warms the body with a prop assisted sequence. This class has a focus on the fundamental pose Upward Facing Dog.

programme.title: Channel Id 1
programme.desc: Channel Id 1

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Find Your Forward Fold – Padangusthasana
programme.desc: Continue your journey with Kino as she breaks down the foundational components of a forward fold. Today, you'll take a vinyasa style warm up before exploring several variations of the standing forward fold and then take it back down to the mat for a nice long Savasana.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Awaken the Spine – Cobra Pose
programme.desc: This powerful practice with Kino will awaken the spine, helping you feel healthier and happier. Begin with a mindful moment and then flow through a fun sequence of mat based core-strengthening and backbending postures.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Eka Tattva
programme.desc: Train your mind in the exercise of concentration as Kino guides you through this 15-minute, beach meditation on the shores of Tulum. Focus your attention on the breath and begin to notice the intricacies of how you breathe.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Mind
programme.desc: Find your way to a comfortable seated position and join in with Kino for this beach side meditation. Cultivate a state of stillness, presence, and deep inner awareness. Find ease and rest as you use this time to take a break from the chatter of the mind.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: Everyday Essentials Trailer

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Is Trailer

programme.title: Yoga Is Wisdom
programme.desc: When you practice regularly, you create the opportunity for wisdom to arise in you. We will use side plank as the vehicle of awareness that might help us glimpse the truth of any given moment. Warm up with Sun Salutations before moving through several side plank positions that will help bring insight into state of the body and mind. By deepening our ability to turn the attention inward we deepen our ability to touch true wisdom.

programme.title: Yoga Is Stillness
programme.desc: One of the key lessons of yoga is stillness, known as Nirodaha in Sanskrit. We will use the headstand position to practice approaching situations with calm and serenity. This class will help you build a strong base and increase awareness in the parts of your body that will support this inversion, especially the core. Don’t be afraid as we approach this challenge, Kino will offer variations so that all levels can experience the meditative stillness of headstand.

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: Channel Id 3

programme.title: Channel Id 2
programme.desc: Channel Id 2

programme.title: Yin Yoga for Deep Relaxation and Healing - Pain Relief — Back, Neck, and Shoulders
programme.desc: Quiet the mind and clam the nervous system with this yin yoga for pain relief and guided meditation lead by Kino MacGregor. Begin with mindfulness, cultivate equanimity and access your inner sanctuary. End each session with positive affirmations and metta (loving-kindness) practice. All levels welcome.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - The importance of a quiet mind
programme.desc: In this episode, Rob talks a little about how to find more happiness in life. After dedicating his life to understanding what leads to true happiness, he’s come to learn that the root of unhappiness seems to come from an overactive mind. Tune in to the full video to learn more.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - How to quiet our mind
programme.desc: True peace is something that exists inside of you at all times, but the only way to access this peace is by learning to quiet the mind. So how do you do it? Watch the video to find out!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - The life intelligence in you
programme.desc: In this video, Rob talks about what you can do to quiet the mind with effortlessness and ease. Once you learn how, over time, you’ll will find that you become increasingly more happy, healthy, loving, and at peace.

programme.title: Love Your Body
programme.desc: Come back into alignment through awareness of the body. Use the breath as an anchor to cultivate present moment awareness. Redirect the attention from the external world to the inner world, beginning with the sensation of breath along the inside of the nostrils. Learn to feel what is rather than generating a story. Allow yourself to feel safe and loved through the practice of mindfulness.

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Shoulder Core and Hips
programme.desc: Work on strengthening the deep muscles that give you stability in your practice.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Marichasana C
programme.desc: Learn the fundamentals of yoga in this short, meditative practice that builds up to the twisting pose, Marichasana C.

programme.title: Halasana
programme.desc: This class establishes a connection to breath, body and mind before flowing into the poses. Use props to support your practice, which builds up to the shoulderstand, Halasana.

programme.title: Leaning into Forward Folds
programme.desc: This session is all about sitting with the hamstrings and forward bends in a state of equanimity. Join Kino as she leads you on a journey to healing. Learn to sit with your discomfort and begin to uncover and understand the intelligent messages that come from within. 25 minutes

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Gratitude
programme.desc: This meditation for manifestation will bring gratitude into your life. Settle the attention on the breath as you drop below the frequency of thought and into a more receptive state. Open up to the field of arising sensation and connect a sense of gratitude for the body as a tool in your mindfulness practice. Cultivate awareness of your inner experience, moving away from loops of thoughts and into a state of equanimity, alignment, deep peace and gratitude.

programme.title: Morning Routine
programme.desc: One of Mark’s favorite morning routines, this is a slow-moving practice featuring static holds.

programme.title: Yoga Is Equanimity
programme.desc: Lolasana is a challenging position that offers a unique opportunity to experience balance and equanimity in both the body and mind. Kino is here to help you find an experience of the equanimous mind, which is not moved by pleasure or pain. This class will guide you through a series of drills that might induce a state annoyance, so that you have an opportunity to practice returning to calm. Through this practice you will face your difficulties and make peace with being exactly where you are.

programme.title: Yoga Is Discipline
programme.desc: Don’t be intimidated, but today’s lesson is on discipline. This class is all about how to get on your mat with discipline and enjoy it. To find comfort and determination in Navasana Kino will guide you towards just the right amount of front body engagement as well as a helpful awareness in the deep core. Mix your discipline with a fun loving attitude and feel that energy that comes when you rise up to a challenge. Tap into a place of infinite strength within, a place of spiritual fortitude, a strength rooted in the beyond

programme.title: The Light at the End of the Tunnel, Happiness after the Storms of Depression Clears with Rob Mack and Kino MacGregor
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Happiness Coach, Robert Mack.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Tridoshic Dinner
programme.desc: Tridoshic meals are those that balance all three of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will teach you how to make Kitchari, a delicious and nutritious meal that is ideal for everyone. Less than 10 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Ayurvedic Dessert
programme.desc: Sahara Rose is a big fan of dessert and in this episode she’s going to show you how to make a healthy Rice Pudding that will satisfy your sweet tooth and nourish your body at the same time. Less than 10 minutes.

programme.title: Yoga Is Peace
programme.desc: Om Shanti. Peace is such an integral part of what yoga is that we usually start and end every class with an invocation of it. This class will utilize a seated forward fold to tap into this yogic sense of tranquility. Today's lesson will increase awareness in pelvis and hips so that we can pivot deeper into Paschimottanasana, the forward fold we visit a few times in the Ashtanga method. Join Kino as we explore yoga as a means to further investigate depths of peacefulness that are possible in practice and life.

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Sirsasana

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer San Fran
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer San Fran

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: Parsvakonasana
programme.desc: Join Kino for a chair yoga class that builds up to Parsvakonasana, the extended side angle pose.

programme.title: Navasana
programme.desc: Come practice an accessible, energizing flow that incorporates yoga basics and builds up to Navasna, the boat pose.

programme.title: Baddha Konasana
programme.desc: Feel the depth and power of the breath in this class that builds up to the hip opening posture Baddha Konasana.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: The Pelvic Floor - Forgive
programme.desc: The journey of yoga is a journey of deep intimacy with the body. In this class you will begin to explore the pelvic floor and the concept of forgiveness. Allow the natural intelligence of the inner body to shine cultivate of deep awareness of the intimate, inner space of the body in this 30 minute practice.

programme.title: Navasana
programme.desc: Come practice an accessible, energizing flow that incorporates yoga basics and builds up to Navasna, the boat pose.

programme.title: Love Your Body
programme.desc: Come back into alignment through awareness of the body. Use the breath as an anchor to cultivate present moment awareness. Redirect the attention from the external world to the inner world, beginning with the sensation of breath along the inside of the nostrils. Learn to feel what is rather than generating a story. Allow yourself to feel safe and loved through the practice of mindfulness.

programme.title: Morning Routine
programme.desc: One of Mark’s favorite morning routines, this is a slow-moving practice featuring static holds.

programme.title: Yoga Is Equanimity
programme.desc: Lolasana is a challenging position that offers a unique opportunity to experience balance and equanimity in both the body and mind. Kino is here to help you find an experience of the equanimous mind, which is not moved by pleasure or pain. This class will guide you through a series of drills that might induce a state annoyance, so that you have an opportunity to practice returning to calm. Through this practice you will face your difficulties and make peace with being exactly where you are.

programme.title: Yoga Is Discipline
programme.desc: Don’t be intimidated, but today’s lesson is on discipline. This class is all about how to get on your mat with discipline and enjoy it. To find comfort and determination in Navasana Kino will guide you towards just the right amount of front body engagement as well as a helpful awareness in the deep core. Mix your discipline with a fun loving attitude and feel that energy that comes when you rise up to a challenge. Tap into a place of infinite strength within, a place of spiritual fortitude, a strength rooted in the beyond

programme.title: Healing and Happiness
programme.desc: Begin practice with a few minutes of mindfulness, feeling the breath and sensation in the body as a way of cultivating inward focus. Shift into a contemplative state, settling the mind below the frequency of thought. Learn to label inner processes in a way that will help you understand the nature of thought and emotion. As the quality of your awareness shifts deeper, Kino will skillfully guide you into a state of contemplation. This practice will help you process emotion and move towards healing and happiness.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: Everyday Essentials Trailer

programme.title: Intro to Everyday Essentials
programme.desc: Sit down with Mark Robberds to discover what this Movement Essentials course is all about.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - The L-sit
programme.desc: Continue your strength progression with Kino. Work on the key elements for L-sits by practicing forward folds, core strengthening drills, and lift ups. End the class by putting all the pieces together to practice the movements required to lift up into L-sits.

programme.title: Boredom in Yoga
programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.desc: Channel Id 3

programme.title: Yoga Is Unity
programme.desc: The traditional definition of yoga is unity. We will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose. Begin practice with a reflection on the connection between breath, body and mind. Next, move through a series of long holds in child’s pose, puppy poses and forward folding. Take a supported hip opener using props if you have them handy and then move into another long hold, this time in Pigeon Pose. Take note of any sensations and feelings that arise, offering yourself true care and opening up to a sense of wholeness.

programme.title: Yoga Is Compassion
programme.desc: This class is centered around a quality that is perhaps the very essence of being a yogi: Compassion. We’ll use the posture Shalabhasana, which is a heart opening backbend, to help you find that compassionate center within yourself. Begin with a moment of loving kindness meditation followed by some physical warm up focused on spinal extension. Follow Kino through a series of backbends that will be a little challenging, but also connect you to the breath and the space around the heart.

programme.title: Vegan for Life with Devyn Howard
programme.desc: This episode of Seek Up is all about food!

programme.title: Boredom in Yoga
programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: Naturally Bliss Trailer

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Miami Heat Fire Session
programme.desc: Feel the heat in this yoga drills class. Kino will guide you through a well-rounded practice, including twists, backbends, core work, and shoulder work. Strengthen your back muscles in bow, bridge, and wheel poses. Explore three-legged dog drills to build core and shoulder strength.

programme.title: Yoga Is Spirit
programme.desc: Today's lesson is on Spirit and how to tune into that space beyond the physical. The vehicle for this deep awareness will be the shoulder stand, Halasana. This class will take you mindfully through warmups and then into several accessible variations of today's inversion practice. You will be invited to drop deeper down into a space of peace as Kino encourages you to tune deeply into the subtle vibrations of the inner body.

programme.title: Get Your Yoga On Trailer
programme.desc: Get Your Yoga On Trailer

programme.title: Purvottanasana
programme.desc: Cultivate a mindful state as you prepare for practice, feeling into the breath and body. Flow through a prop supported sequence that builds up to Purvottanasana.

programme.title: Invert - Awaken
programme.desc: Join Kino for a class that’s all about inversions and the mindset of awakening. This 30-minute practice invites you to seize the opportunity to remain present and awake in the challenge of the practice. Begin the journey of turning yourself upside down to awaken the sleeper within.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story
programme.desc: In this last video, Rob shares a story that will help remind you of everything you’ve learned through this course. This story offers up one more practice that you can apply to your life to truly become a rich yogi.

programme.title: Buzzards Bay/Buttermilk Bay- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Buzzards Bay is home to the amazing Mass Maritime Academy and is considered part of the Gateway to Cape Cod, along with Wareham. Nestled at the west end of the Cape Cod Canal and home to the world famous Cape Cod Canal Rail Road Draw Bridge, Buzzards Bay is a busy summer destination for folks looking for that special New England Sea Side experience. When there, you will be able to enjoy so many seafood restaurants, ice cream stands and even get to visit the National Marine Life Center right near the train bridge. Life is Great New England has a full episode dedicated to this section of the state and is worth checking out! Don't forget to check out the world famous Buzzards Bay Oyster Festival that takes place each May right beneath the rail road bridge by the canal. This video also flys over Buttermilk Bay, which is a neighborhood and section of Bourne, Buzzards Bay, Plymouth and Wareham that shares this distinction.

programme.title: Colonial Williamsburg - Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Beyond Your Backyard goes back in time and learns about American life in Colonial Williamsburg. Erik The Travel Guy steps into the shoes of an early American settler in this historic triangle where he takes up arms and learns all about the proper way to fire a musket, ax-throwing, the honest slave story, and how to make delicious ginger biscuits.

programme.title: Forefathers Monument- Above New England
programme.desc: Standing high above the town of Plymouth, 81 foot tall Forefathers Monument represents the most important ideals of the new nation forming hundreds of years ago. Morality, Law, Education, and Liberty are values expressed by this monument along with faith, justice, freedom and more. This flight is a patriotic journey that will leave you with goosebumps and pride. A visit to Plymouth MA is not complete without a visit to this wonderful park. The Forefathers Monument is considered the world's largest solid granite monument and can be seen for miles around when in America's Hometown. Shot by Chuck Nilosek of New England Drone.

programme.title: Easton MA- Above Massachusetts

programme.title: Spring Thaw on Herring Pond in Plymouth- Above New England
programme.desc: When a hint of Spring is in the air and the ice begins its process of melting, a beautiful event takes place where the water ways feel and look as though they are filled with shimmering diamonds. Pretty soon this body of fresh water will be occupied with pontoon boats filled with party goers and campers in canoes from the local Camp Bournedale. However, in the meantime, let's enjoy the moment and take in the beauty from this rare point in time. Shot by Chuck Nilosek from Drone New England.

programme.title: Life is Great New England- Sports & Food from 42 Degrees North of Plymouth- Full Episode
programme.desc: What a great time the Life is Great New England team had at 42 Degrees North in Manomet with owner Erik Hynes, while we talked sports and all things awesome! Alice Cook spent some time with New England Patriots Legend Steve Grogan, and Jon Meterparel met up with the next football up and coming star Troy Flutie. Lastly, Chuck Nilosek got to live out a life long dream of playing at Fenway Park for Fantasy Day sponsored by the Jimmy Fund and the Dana Farber Cancer Institute.

programme.title: Duxbury Beach & The Powderpoint Bridge- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Aside from Duxbury Beach being one of the most beautiful New England beaches, imagine getting there by one of the longest wooden suspension bridges in the world...well the Powderpoint Bridge WAS ONCE the longest bridge of its kind until an unfortunate fire took it out. It has since been repaired and is the gateway for thousands to head out for a day by the sea! Captured by Drone Artist Chuck Nilosek from New England Drone Services.

programme.title: Bar Harbor Maine- A coastal Gem

Watch as the boats leave for their long days of fishing, lobstering or taking tourists out for a day of sightseeing.

programme.desc: The Mountain Report- Quebec

programme.title: Sunday Storytellers Series - John Smith Nu Shooz -
programme.desc: Sunday Storytellers Series - John Smith Nu Shooz -

programme.title: Cape Cod Canal/Sagamore Bridge- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Fly above the Cape Cod Canal and see the bridges and sights from our camera in the sky! Witness the action on the Sagamore & Bourne Bridges as workers, tourist and regular people, travel back and forth from the mainland to the Cape. Then get ready to see the Scusset Beach State Park and Beach area on the East end of the Canal.

programme.title: Spring Thaw on Herring Pond in Plymouth- Above New England
programme.desc: When a hint of Spring is in the air and the ice begins its process of melting, a beautiful event takes place where the water ways feel and look as though they are filled with shimmering diamonds. Pretty soon this body of fresh water will be occupied with pontoon boats filled with party goers and campers in canoes from the local Camp Bournedale. However, in the meantime, let's enjoy the moment and take in the beauty from this rare point in time. Shot by Chuck Nilosek from Drone New England.

programme.title: Livingston Taylor - Life Is Good - Music Documentary
programme.desc: Livingston Taylor - Life Is Good - Music Documentary

programme.title: Minot Ledge Light
programme.desc: Minot Ledge Light

programme.title: Zadar Croatia
programme.desc: Zadar Croatia

programme.title: Horseneck Beach & Dartmouth MA- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Horseneck Beach is an enormously popular summertime destination for people seeking adventurous surf as well as fun in the sand. Located in the South Eastern part of the state, Darmouth hosts UMASS Dartmouth as well as many scenic hiking trails and other natural sights that keep people coming back year after year.

programme.title: Visit the World Famous Cabby Shack in America's Hometown!
programme.desc: Visit the World Famous Cabby Shack in America's Hometown!

programme.title: Beyond Your Backyard- Thanksgiving - Plymouth & Cooking Tips
programme.desc: Beyond Your Backyard- Thanksgiving - Plymouth & Cooking Tips

programme.title: Duxbury Beach & The Powderpoint Bridge- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Aside from Duxbury Beach being one of the most beautiful New England beaches, imagine getting there by one of the longest wooden suspension bridges in the world...well the Powderpoint Bridge WAS ONCE the longest bridge of its kind until an unfortunate fire took it out. It has since been repaired and is the gateway for thousands to head out for a day by the sea! Captured by Drone Artist Chuck Nilosek from New England Drone Services.

programme.title: LIVINGSTON TAYLOR AND THE BBC CONCERT ORCHESTRA!
programme.desc: LIVINGSTON TAYLOR AND THE BBC CONCERT ORCHESTRA!

programme.title: Visit Buzzards Bay- Life is Great New England
programme.desc: Life is Great New England headed to Buzzards Bay to dine at the Mezza Luna, with owner Emilio Cubelis, then met up with the Commander of the Mass Maritime Academy for a look at that historic institution. We also got a behind the scenes look at how the Cape Cod Canal Rail Road Bridge operates from the Army Corp of Engineers.
